message:
✨ Add per-dashboard "Pin" toggle to remember scroll position (#252)

Add a "Pin" checkbox to every dashboard header (next to Auto refresh)
that controls whether scroll position is restored when navigating back
to that dashboard. When enabled (default), the dashboard restores
scroll to where the user left off. When disabled, navigating to the
dashboard always starts at the top.

The preference is stored per-path in localStorage and persists across
sessions. Scroll position is always saved regardless of the toggle —
the toggle only affects whether it's restored on navigation.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
